home.heroSubtitle: Statistical models + machine learning for accurate forecasts

about.heading: About Football Value Bets
about.intro: FVB is an AI-powered football prediction platform that uses statistical models and machine learning to find value bets across major European leagues.
about.step1Desc: Fixtures, odds, standings and injuries from professional data providers
about.step2Desc: ELO ratings, form metrics, xG rolling averages for each team
about.step3Desc: Dixon-Coles probability model in goals and xG dual-mode
about.step4Desc: Stacking meta-model combines multiple signals into final probabilities
about.step5Desc: Compare model probabilities with bookmaker odds to find value
about.step6Desc: Track every prediction, measure ROI and calibration
about.leaguesText: Premier League, La Liga, Serie A, Bundesliga, Ligue 1, and Primeira Liga.
about.technologyText: Built with Python, FastAPI, and PostgreSQL. Dixon-Coles probability model, ELO rating system with home advantage adjustment, and a stacking ensemble for final predictions. All data processed automatically every day.
about.methodologyIntro: Every prediction goes through a rigorous multi-model pipeline combining classical statistical methods with modern machine learning. Here is how each component works.
about.dixonColesText: The Dixon-Coles model is a bivariate Poisson regression specifically designed for football. Unlike standard Poisson, it corrects for the correlation between low-scoring outcomes (0-0, 1-0, 0-1, 1-1) through a correction parameter ρ. We fit the model in two modes simultaneously: actual goals scored and expected goals (xG), giving us dual probability estimates for each match.
about.eloText: Each team maintains a dynamic ELO rating updated after every match. Our implementation accounts for home-field advantage, goal difference margin (with diminishing returns for blowouts), and seasonal regression to the mean. ELO difference between teams serves as a key feature in the stacking model.
about.stackingText: The final probabilities come from a softmax regression meta-model that combines 11 features: three Poisson probabilities, three Dixon-Coles (goals) probabilities, three Dixon-Coles (xG) probabilities, ELO difference, and the delta between fair home and away odds. This stacking approach consistently outperforms any single model.
about.dataSourcesText: We collect fixture data, live odds, standings, and injury reports from professional football data providers. The pipeline runs automatically multiple times per day, ensuring predictions reflect the latest available information before each match.
about.transparencyText: Every prediction is recorded and publicly tracked. Our track record page shows real results: wins, losses, ROI, and profit — with no cherry-picking. We use industry-standard metrics (RPS, Brier score, log-loss) to continuously evaluate model calibration.
about.teamText: Football Value Bets is developed by a team of data scientists and football analysts. The platform combines academic research in sports analytics with practical betting market experience.
about.disclaimerText: All information is provided for educational and entertainment purposes only. Past performance does not guarantee future results. We are not responsible for any financial decisions made based on our predictions.

footer.disclaimer: Information provided for educational purposes only. We are not responsible for financial decisions.
